method: Greedy Sampling on the Feature Space (GSx)
title: Greedy Sampling on the Feature Space (GSx)
text_0: **Idea:** Greedy Sampling in the Feature Space (GSx) select those samples that increase the diversity of the feature space the most. It does this by selecting those features that are the furthest away from all previously labeled samples.

method: Greedy Sampling on the Target Space (GSy)
title: Greedy Sampling on the Target Space (GSy)
text_0: **Idea:** Greedy Sampling on the Target Space (GSy) at first selects those samples that to maximize the diversity in the feature space and then selects samples to maximize the diversity in the target space. The diversity is maximized by selecting those samples that are the furthest away from all previously labeled samples. To measure the distance in the target space the strategy predicts the label corresponding to each sample.

title: Improved Greedy Sampling (GSi)
text_0: **Idea:** Improved Greedy Sampling (GSi) at first selects those samples that maximize the diversity in the feature space and then selects samples to maximize the diversity in the combined space of features and targets. The diversity is maximized by selecting those samples that are the furthest away from all previously labeled samples. The distance in the combined space is measured as the product of the distance in the feature space and the target space. To measure the distance in the target space the strategy predicts the label corresponding to each unlabeled sample.
